mapper.select: SELECT COURSE_NO AS courseNo, COURSE_NM AS courseNm, COURSE_INFO AS courseInfo, COURSE_PATH_NM AS coursePathNm, COURSE_DSTNC AS courseDstnc, COURSE_REQ_TM AS courseReqTm FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_NO = #{courseNo}

SELECT CT.CT_NO AS ctNo, CT.COURSE_NO AS courseNo, CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID AS tripContsId, CT.CT_ORDER AS ctOrder, T.TRIP_NM AS tripNm, T.TRIP_ADDR AS tripAddr, T.TRIP_PATH_NM AS tripPathNm, T.TRIP_LAT AS tripLat, T.TRIP_LOT AS tripLot FROM COURSE_TRIP CT JOIN TRIP T ON CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID = T.TRIP_CONTS_ID WHERE CT.COURSE_NO = #{courseNo} ORDER BY CT.CT_ORDER ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COURSE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO course (COURSE_NO, COURSE_NM, COURSE_INFO, COURSE_PATH_NM, COURSE_DSTNC, COURSE_REQ_TM) VALUES (#{courseNo}, #{courseNm}, #{courseInfo}, #{coursePathNm}, #{courseDstnc}, #{courseReqTm})

SELECT SEQ_CT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO COURSE_TRIP (CT_NO, COURSE_NO, TRIP_CONTS_ID, CT_ORDER) VALUES (#{ctNo}, #{courseNo}, #{tripContsId}, #{ctOrder})

SELECT SEQ_REL_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RELATION (REL_NO, REL_CLSF, USER_NO, COURSE_NO, TRIP_CONTS_ID) VALUES (#{relNo}, #{relClsf}, #{userNo}, #{courseNo}, #{tripContsId})
mapper.select: SELECT CT.CT_NO AS ctNo, CT.COURSE_NO AS courseNo, CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID AS tripContsId, CT.CT_ORDER AS ctOrder, T.TRIP_NM AS tripNm, T.TRIP_ADDR AS tripAddr, T.TRIP_LAT AS tripLat, T.TRIP_LOT AS tripLot FROM COURSE_TRIP CT JOIN TRIP T ON CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID = T.TRIP_CONTS_ID WHERE CT.COURSE_NO = #{courseNo} AND T.TRIP_LAT IS NOT NULL AND T.TRIP_LOT IS NOT NULL AND T.TRIP_LAT != 0 AND T.TRIP_LOT != 0 ORDER BY CT.CT_ORDER ASC

SELECT C.COURSE_NO, C.COURSE_NM, C.COURSE_INFO, C.COURSE_PATH_NM, C.COURSE_DSTNC, C.COURSE_REQ_TM, CT.CT_NO, CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID, CT.CT_ORDER, T.TRIP_NM, T.TRIP_ADDR, T.TRIP_PATH_NM, T.TRIP_LAT, T.TRIP_LOT FROM RELATION R JOIN COURSE C ON R.COURSE_NO = C.COURSE_NO LEFT JOIN COURSE_TRIP CT ON C.COURSE_NO = CT.COURSE_NO LEFT JOIN TRIP T ON CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID = T.TRIP_CONTS_ID WHERE R.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND R.REL_CLSF = 30 AND R.COURSE_NO IS NOT NULL ORDER BY C.COURSE_NO DESC, CT.CT_ORDER ASC
SELECT COURSE_NO, COURSE_NM, COURSE_INFO, COURSE_PATH_NM, COURSE_DSTNC, COURSE_REQ_TM FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_NO = #{courseNo}
